message:
🌱 Add dragonfly: Helm-Chart mission (#1284)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dragonfly-57-helm-chart",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dragonfly: Helm-Chart",
+    "description": "Helm-Chart. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dragonfly deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nhelm list -n dragonfly 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dragonfly installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dragonfly configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly\n```\nHey Folks,\n\nI just stumbled across this insane project - great work so far! 🚀  \n\nI was wondering if you guys are already working on a `helm`-Chart in order to deploy `dragonfly` to Kubernetes?\nIt would be a lot easier for us to test `dragonfly` in"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Helm-Chart",
+        "description": "This is a first, working, but kinda rudimentary helm chart. This should address #57.\n\nBut it supports\n- persistence for /data (if enabled, a Statefulset is deployed)\n- mounting extra volumes (for logs, debugging, whatever)\n- initContainers (adjusting the pod's ulimit, possibly)\n- passing extra\n```yaml\nextraVolumes:\n  - name: test-volume\n    emptyDir: {}\n\nextraVolumeMounts:\n  - name: test-volume\n    mountPath: /test\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Helm-Chart\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a first, working, but kinda rudimentary helm chart. This should address #57.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "extraVolumes:\n  - name: test-volume\n    emptyDir: {}\n\nextraVolumeMounts:\n  - name: test-volume\n    mountPath: /test",
+        "initContainers:\n  - name: test\n    command:\n    - sh\n    - -c\n    - df -h\n    image: busybox",
+        "storage:\n  enabled: true\n  requests: 1Gi"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dragonfly",
+      "community",
+      "cache",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "dragonfly"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Statefulset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/dragonflydb/dragonfly/issues/57",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/dragonflydb/dragonfly",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/dragonflydb/dragonfly/pull/79"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 28,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with dragonfly installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T07:02:58.951Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
